rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for interface assumptions/guarantees, and implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE annexes are visible in the target AADL scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified names not present in the analyzed model.
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to outputs; implementation contracts should bind subcomponent features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level guarantees must not reference subcomponent paths not visible in type scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference event ports as numeric or Boolean values without model-provided data.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
